The account.move model exposed to me only has 8 fields — none for invoice lines, line descriptions, taxes, line amounts, currency, or the standard "invoice_line_ids" you'd need to create a proper vendor bill. Without invoice lines, I cannot record what was actually purchased (a server? a domain? cloud storage?), nor can I record tax correctly.

Given what I have from the PDF, here's the situation:

What I can confirm from the PDF:

Vendor: Hetzner Online GmbH (R0012345678) ✓
Invoice number: R0012345678
Invoice date: 2026-06-30
Total: 47.60 EUR (gross)

What's missing from the PDF source (and would normally be required for a proper vendor bill):

Line items (description, quantity, unit price, net amount)
VAT/tax breakdown (the PDF has no tax lines at all, so I cannot derive net from gross)
Vendor tax ID / IBAN
Service period
